responses.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The song performance audio matches the phonetics in the Reference JSON for FLOW's 'GO!!!'. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song segment from 02:54 onwards. The first part of the video was fully transcribed and translated manually from native audio perception. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to vocal bursts, with short, well-structured blocks matching the fast-paced nature of the performance.

subtitles.original: ...お祝いさせてもらえると、嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: ...I'd be so happy if you could celebrate with me!

subtitles.original: わぁ！こんちはや！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Wow! Konchihaya! Thank you!

subtitles.original: ということでね、一旦ちょっと
subtitles.english: So, for now...

subtitles.original: 2曲歌わせていただいたので振り返っていこうかなと思うんですが
subtitles.english: since I've sung two songs, I thought we could look back on them,

subtitles.original: まずは1曲目！「Driver's High」を海沿いを、
subtitles.english: but first, the first song! "Driver's High" along the coast,

subtitles.original: フブタローでドライブしながら歌わせていただきました！
subtitles.english: I got to sing it while driving in the Fubutaro!

subtitles.original: どうでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: デビューのね、一番最初にL'Arc-en-Cielの曲を歌って、
subtitles.english: At my debut, the very first thing I did was sing a L'Arc-en-Ciel song,

subtitles.original: で、この「Driver's High」をいつか歌ってほしいってすごい、
subtitles.english: and I was told so many times that they wanted me to sing "Driver's High" someday,

subtitles.original: いっぱい言われていたので、絶対に生誕で歌おうと思って、1曲目に選びました！
subtitles.english: so I definitely wanted to sing it for my birthday, and chose it as the first song!

subtitles.original: いや、あの、
subtitles.english: Well, um...

subtitles.original: まああの、あそこカバーの私有地なので、
subtitles.english: well, since that place is Cover's private property,

subtitles.original: 色々もろもろひっくるめて、OKです！大丈夫！大丈夫！きっと大丈夫！
subtitles.english: taking everything into account, it's OK! It's fine! It's fine! I'm sure it's fine!

subtitles.original: そして2曲目！「小さな恋のうた」でした！どうでしたでしょうか！
subtitles.english: And the second song! It was "Chiisana Koi no Uta"! How was it?

subtitles.original: そう、これ！
subtitles.english: Yes, this!

subtitles.original: 千速が弾いてましたよ！
subtitles.english: Chihaya was playing it!

subtitles.original: いやあの、ご存知の方も多いかなと思いますが、ね、エレキを購入しまして練習していたんですが、
subtitles.english: Well, as many of you probably know, I bought an electric guitar and have been practicing,

subtitles.original: あの、弾かせていただきました！
subtitles.english: and I got to play it!

subtitles.original: やっぱりなんか、エレキで初めて挑戦するのってなんか、「小さな恋のうた」だよなってイメージがあって、
subtitles.english: Somehow, I had this image that the first song to challenge on electric guitar should be "Chiisana Koi no Uta",

subtitles.original: この曲を選んだんですけど、すっごい難しい！
subtitles.english: so I chose this song, but it's so difficult!

subtitles.original: すっごい難しかったんですけど、でもね、生誕ライブでかっこいいところ見せたかったので、
subtitles.english: It was extremely difficult, but I wanted to show a cool side of me at my birthday live,

subtitles.original: いっぱい、いっぱい、いっぱい練習して、
subtitles.english: so I practiced over and over and over again,

subtitles.original: 弾けてたよね？なんとか。弾けてたと思います！
subtitles.english: And I managed to play it, right? Somehow. I think I was able to play it!

subtitles.original: なのでね、いっぱい、あの、後でアーカイブとかも見直して、聴いてくれると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: So, I'd be happy if you could look back at the archive later and listen to it a lot!

subtitles.original: ということで、そしてね、お気づきの方もいますが、「小さな恋のうた」最初は体育館だったんですけど、
subtitles.english: By the way, some of you may have noticed, but for "Chiisana Koi no Uta", we started in a gym,

subtitles.original: 外に出ることができましたよ！
subtitles.english: but we were able to go outside!

subtitles.original: やっぱ夏といえば、外！海！山！自然！
subtitles.english: After all, when you think of summer, it's outdoors! The ocean! Mountains! Nature!

subtitles.original: そして、夏の音楽といえばフェス！をイメージして、
subtitles.english: And when you think of summer music, it's festivals! With that image in mind,

subtitles.original: 夏フェス会場になっております！
subtitles.english: this has become a summer festival venue!

subtitles.original: 後ろにはね、海もあって、最高のロケーションで、
subtitles.english: In the background, there's the ocean, and in this amazing location,

subtitles.original: 今日はフェスを開催していければなと思っております！
subtitles.english: I hope we can hold the festival today!

subtitles.original: こんなにね、広いので、あっちに行ったり、あ、ちょっと、予定にない動きをしてすみません、本当に。
subtitles.english: It's so spacious, so going over there... ah, sorry for the unplanned movement, really.

subtitles.original: こっちに行ったりしていこうと思っています。
subtitles.english: I'm planning to go this way and that.

subtitles.original: では、まあ、ちょっとあんまり喋るとね、あれなので、次の曲行こうと思うので、
subtitles.english: Well, if I talk too much, we won't get to it, so I think I'll move on to the next song.

subtitles.original: ちょっと準備するので、ギターとマイク置いてきます。ちょっと待っててね。行ってきます！
subtitles.english: I need to prepare, so I'll go put down the guitar and mic. Please wait a bit. Off I go!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで！
subtitles.english: Alright, so!

subtitles.original: はい、来ました、来ました！ということでここからはですね、ゲストブロックになります！
subtitles.english: Yes, I'm back, I'm back! So from here on, it will be the guest block!

subtitles.original: ので、このあともいっぱい楽しんでいってください！盛り上がっていくぞー！
subtitles.english: So please continue to enjoy it to the fullest! Let's get fired up!

subtitles.original: GO!!!
subtitles.english: GO!!!

subtitles.original: 険しい修羅の道の中
subtitles.english: In the midst of this steep, harsh path,

subtitles.original: 他人の地図を広げて何処へ行く？
subtitles.english: whose map are you opening to find where you're going?

subtitles.original: 極彩色のカラスがそれを
subtitles.english: A multicolored crow

subtitles.original: 奪い取って破り捨てた
subtitles.english: snatched it away and tore it up

subtitles.original: さぁ心の目見開いて
subtitles.english: Now, open your mind's eye

subtitles.original: しかと今を見極めろ
subtitles.english: and take a firm look at the present

subtitles.original: 失うモノなんてないさ
subtitles.english: There is nothing to lose,

subtitles.original: いざ参ろう！
subtitles.english: so let's go!

subtitles.original: いつも僕らを惑わせる

subtitles.original: 有言実行 大きな風が

subtitles.original: うねりを上げて吹き荒れる

subtitles.original: 己の未来切り開け
